name: AI Spec Analysis Platform
description: Multi-pipeline, multi-tool platform for converting raw specs into business-flow and test-strategy artifacts.

canonical.note: These top-level directories are the single source of truth. Tool adapters (.claude/, .github/prompts/) mirror them — not the other way around.

business-flow.description: Reads specs/<project>/ → normalizes corpus → extracts 19-section business-flow document → renders Mermaid diagrams
business-flow.cliCommand: pnpm run tool -- run --spec-dir specs/<project> --slug <slug> --mode heuristic

test-strategy.description: Reads specs/<project>/ → normalizes corpus → extracts evidence-backed test strategy document with test cases, risk matrix, and regression checklist
test-strategy.cliCommand: pnpm run tool -- test-strategy --spec-dir specs/<project> --slug <slug> --mode heuristic

claude-code.note: Generated compatibility layer. agents/, rules/, skills/ inside .claude/ mirror canonical top-level directories. Do not edit .claude/ directly — edit canonical sources and sync.

github-copilot.note: Copilot Chat reads .github/prompts/ for prompt files. Canonical prompts live in ./prompts/ — .github/prompts/ is a compatibility mirror.

cursor.note: Future Cursor adapter. Not yet implemented — add .cursor/rules/ mirror when Cursor integration is needed.

syncNote: Run this to regenerate all tool adapter files from canonical sources. Replaces symlinks with generated copies for Windows/Docker/CI compatibility.
